hero.name: Brandon Jame Isla Cconislla
hero.title: Junior Backend Developer
hero.subtitle: Specialized in RESTful APIs, ERP integrations, and process automation. I build robust backend solutions with Node.js, Python, and cloud architectures.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Systems Engineering student (10th semester) with solid experience as a Junior Backend Developer. Specialized in designing, developing, and integrating RESTful services and APIs using Node.js and JSON-based architectures.
about.p2: Experienced in web service consumption, secure authentication with Bearer Tokens, and Swagger documentation. I handle backend logic with JavaScript and Python, relational databases, and have a strong motivation for designing scalable architectures in Cloud environments.

experience.title: Experience
experience.job1_desc: Developed integrations and automated electronic invoicing in Oracle NetSuite ERP for clients in Spain and Colombia.
experience.job1_bullet1: Built XML templates with FreeMarker and JavaScript integrations to automate electronic invoicing processes in NetSuite ERP.
experience.job1_bullet2: Implemented automatic XML generation for electronic invoices in Spain following Spanish Tax Agency (AEAT) rules.
experience.job1_bullet3: Integrated XML submission to electronic providers via REST endpoints, with Bearer Token authentication and Swagger documentation.
experience.job1_bullet4: Implemented web service consumption to handle fiscal events in Colombia (acknowledgment, receipt, acceptance/claim) in an automated flow.
experience.job1_bullet5: Participated in requirements analysis, combining technical perspective with understanding of international tax regulations.
experience.job2_company: Procesos de Medios de Pago S.A. (IZIPAY)
experience.job2_desc: Process automation and data management in a hybrid environment.
experience.job2_bullet1: Developed a Python web scraping script for the INDECOPI platform, extracting and structuring case data into a collaborative Excel sheet.
experience.job2_bullet2: Migrated and classified historical contract documentation to the internal system, ensuring data integrity and traceability.
experience.job2_bullet3: Automated report updates using pivot tables and charts in Excel, reducing report generation time.
experience.edu_company: National Technological University of Lima Sur (UNTELS)
experience.edu_desc: Training in software engineering, databases, networking, systems architecture, and technology project management.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: I'm open to new opportunities. Feel free to reach out.
